title: Soul Sand Suffocates Silverfish
description: This datapack adds back a lost feature of soul sand to kill silverfish/endermites
body:
# Soul Sand Suffocates Silverfish
Silverfish and endermites get damaged when standing on soul sand. This used to be an old feature in 1.8 and got removed sometime in 1.15(?). 
### Versions
This datapack should work for 1.18-1.19.4+. It might work in older versions as well.
### Compatibility
This datapack is compatible with my "Hostile Mobs Improve Over time" datapack.

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hostile-mobs-improve-over-time)
